recommendations.title: Blue Jay
recommendations.overview: Meeting by chance when they return to their tiny California hometown, two former high-school sweethearts reflect on their shared past.

recommendations.title: The Trouble with You
recommendations.overview: Detective Yvonne is the widow of police chief Santi, a local hero in a town on the French Riviera. When she learns he was in fact a crooked cop, she tries to right his wrongs. Crossing paths with Antoine, a victim of Santi, sets off a series of wild

recommendations.title: Forsaken
recommendations.overview: John Henry returns to his hometown in hopes of repairing his relationship with his estranged father, but a local gang is terrorizing the town. John Henry is the only one who can stop them, however he has abandoned both his gun and reputation as a fea

recommendations.title: The Old Way
recommendations.overview: An old gunslinger and his daughter must face the consequences of his past, when the son of a man he killed years ago arrives to take his revenge.

recommendations.title: Troublemakers
recommendations.overview: Two brothers who hate themselves are going to spend Christmas with their mother. She tries to get them together.

recommendations.title: El Infierno
recommendations.overview: After being deported back to Mexico, a man has no choice but to join the vicious drug cartel that has corrupted his hometown in order to survive.

recommendations.title: Afterlife of the Party
recommendations.overview: A social butterfly who dies during her birthday week is given a second chance to right her wrongs on Earth.

recommendations.title: Appaloosa
recommendations.overview: Two friends hired to police a small town that is suffering under the rule of a rancher find their job complicated by the arrival of a young widow.

recommendations.title: Magnificent Obsession
recommendations.overview: Reckless playboy Bob Merrick crashes his speedboat, requiring emergency attention from the town’s only resuscitator while a local hero, Dr. Phillips, dies waiting for the life-saving device. Merrick then tries to right his wrongs with the doctor’s wi

recommendations.title: Scrooged
